name: Ironsoul's Condemnors
inspire: Immediately after making an Attack roll or Save roll for a friendly fighter, if that roll included any {icon:crit}, Inspire that fighter.

reactions.name: Punishing Blow
reactions.trigger: Use this immediately after you a pick weapon as part of an Attack by a friendly Brodus.
reactions.flavorText: Brodus's Greatmace charges up with celestial energy.
reactions.rulesText: That weapon has +X Attack dice, where X is equal to the battle round. You can only use this ability once per game.

reactions.name: Aetherically Charged Shield
reactions.trigger: Use this immediately after your opponent picks a weapon as part of an Attack that targets a friendly shield aetheric ({icon:shield}).
reactions.flavorText: With potent celestial magic, the Sequitors' shields light ablaze with cerulean power.
reactions.rulesText: Weapon abilities cannot be used for that Attack. You can only use this ability once per game.

reactions.name: Aetherically Charged Maul
reactions.trigger: Use this immediately after you pick a weapon as part of an Attack by a friendly shield aetheric ({icon:shield}).
reactions.flavorText: Weapons crackling with power, the Sequitors blast the enemy to smoking ruin.
reactions.rulesText: That weapon has + 1 Range for that Attack. You can only use this ability once per game.

abilities.name: Bulwark against the Dark
abilities.flavorText: The Condemnors stand firm against the horrors of the realms.
abilities.rulesText: Friendly fighters with no Move and/or Charge tokens cannot be driven back.
